name: Tropical Fruit Dip
recipeIngredient: 1 cup low-fat or regular sour cream
5 cups assorted fruit (pineapple, pears, oranges, strawberries, starfruit), cut into bite-sized pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients except the fruit in a bowl.
2. Cover and refrigerate for at least 2 hours to allow flavors to blend.
3. Sprinkle with additional coconut if desired.
4. Serve with the fruit.
